---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the quant infrastructure
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Brief description of the feature

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

How do you propose implementing this feature?

## Technical Details

- Module: [e.g., data, backtesting, risk]
- Dependencies: [list any new dependencies]
- Complexity: [low/medium/high]

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Feature works as expected
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code reviewed
